headline: BRMSTE · LNbits · armed Lightning invoices
definition: LNbits Lightning invoice rail. Invoices are armed (ready to issue) against an LNbits wallet reachable at LNBITS_URL using LNBITS_INVOICE_KEY. Agents arm and issue invoices; the LNbits node settles. bolt11 decode is used to verify each armed invoice before it is surfaced.

settlement.policy: receive/settle only · agents not in tx · no holding wallets

credentials.policy: env-only · never committed · never asked in chat
